nodes.name: action_wrapper.py
nodes.summary: Implements action space wrapper classes for gymnasium environments. Provides BinaryAction and ThreeStep_Action wrappers that transform continuous action outputs into discrete or modified action spaces for EV charging control.

nodes.name: state.py
nodes.summary: Defines state representation functions for RL agents, including GNN-based state representations. Contains PublicPST_GNN and V2G_ProfitMax_with_Loads_GNN functions that construct PyTorch Geometric graph objects from environment state for GNN processing.

nodes.name: train_RL_GNN.py
nodes.summary: Main entry point for training GNN-based reinforcement learning agents (TD3_GNN, TD3_ActionGNN, SAC, SAC_ActionGNN). Orchestrates environment setup, model initialization, training loops with W&B logging, and evaluation using GNN state representations.

nodes.name: train_baselines.py
nodes.summary: Training script for baseline reinforcement learning algorithms without GNN using stable-baselines3 library. Supports multiple algorithms (PPO, A2C, DDPG, SAC, TD3, DQN, etc.) with optional discrete action spaces and action masking.

nodes.name: evaluator.py
nodes.summary: Evaluation script for trained agents across multiple algorithms and baseline strategies. Compares RL models (GNN-based and standard) against heuristic and MPC baselines on key performance metrics like rewards, tracking error, and energy metrics.

nodes.name: component_analysis.py
nodes.summary: Analysis script for decomposing and examining individual components of model performance. Analyzes specific aspects of trained agents' decisions and outcomes on component-level metrics.

nodes.name: discrete_eda.py
nodes.summary: Exploratory data analysis script comparing performance metrics between models with discrete and continuous action spaces. Generates visualizations of optimality gaps and performance comparisons across different algorithms.

nodes.name: generalization_eda.py
nodes.summary: Analysis script for evaluating model generalization across different environment configurations and scenarios. Computes optimality gaps and visualization of algorithms' performance when trained in one scenario and tested in generalized settings.
